Q5 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • Beginner • +2 / -0
Not attempted

If the letters of the word “FATHER” are rearrange and all possible six letter words are formed and then written out as in a dictionary then rank of the word “FATHER” is ________.

NAT
Correct answer: 261 (261 - 261)
Solution

261 (261 - 261)

Q6 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • Beginner • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

Six persons A, B, C, D, E and F are standing in a row. C and D are standing close to each other alongside E. B is standing beside A only. A is fourth from F. Who are standing on the extremes?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
As per data given,
CDE will be together in some order i.e.
CDE or ECD or DCE or EDC
Since, A is fourth from F, the possible combinations are
F _ _ _ A_ or _F _ _ _ A
or
Since E, C and D are together and B is besides A, the possible combination is F(ECD)AB.
Thus, B and F have to be at extremes.

Q8 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • Beginner • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of the following sentence is correct?

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
The singular noun ‘rupee’ is used before note or notes. The word 'rupee' should be used in the singular form and the word 'note' should be used in the plural form.

Q9 Not checked
General Aptitude • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • Beginner • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

______ you have a doubt, why not go and verify? I shall be waiting in the shade_____ this Banyan tree till you come back_____ me.
The option that best fills the blanks in the above sentence would be:

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Since the first sentence is a question, if is more appropriate than as. Shade of this tree and back to me are the appropriate usages.

Q20 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Six jobs are to be processed, firstly on machine-I and then on machine-II. The processing time of the jobs are given below:

The optimal sequence to process the jobs to minimize the makespan time is

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
Using Johnson’s algorithm,
If minimum time is for machine-I, schedule it at first and if minimum time is for machine-II, schedule it last so the optimum sequence is
F - C - A - E - D - B

Q33 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following purpose(s) is/are CORRECT regarding performing annealing rest treatment?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(b, c, d)
Purpose of annealing:
• To increase ductility
• To relieve internal stresses
• To improve machinability
• To reduce hardness
• To reduce or eliminate structural inhomogeneity
• To prepare steel for subsequent heat treatment

Q34 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Which of the following statement(s) is/are correct regarding providing nose radius in single point cutting tool?

Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, d)
Providing nose radius in single point cutting tool:
• It strengthen tool nose by reducing stress concentration.
• In increases tool life
• It provide better surface finish.
• Tool large nose radius induces chatter.
• If nose radius is increased cutting force and cutting power also increases.
